```
    private static double[] rgb(int color) {
        int r = (color >> 16) & 0xFF;
        int g = (color >> 8) & 0xFF;
        int b = (color >> 0) & 0xFF;
        return new double[] {r / 255.0, g / 255.0, b / 255.0};
    }
```
